text:
Tipp track star Sharlene Mawdsley was part of Team Ireland at the Paris Olympic Games. She is part of the Women's 4 x 400m Final relay team who have made the Final!

Before she said bon voyage, RTÉjr caught up with Sharlene to find out what things were like for her growing up in Newport, Co Tipperary. Press play above to find out about her school days and some of her fave things!

For more fun with Team Ireland check out onRTÉjr InstaandRTÉ Kids TikTok! We will have loads more content dropping and we'll keep it going for the Paralympics too!!

For all the latest news check out Paris 2024 on RTÉ.ie.

title: Olympics: Getting to know Sharlene Mawdsley with RTÉjr
description: RTÉjr caught with Team Ireland Olympic Athlete Sharlene Mawdsley to ask some fun questions!
